# ContestOps AI Strategic Brief

Version: `0.5.0`
Category: Entrepreneurship & Job Creation
Deadline: 2026-08-17 13:00 PDT
Production readiness: 86%

## Winning Thesis

ContestOps AI should be judged by its ability to turn opportunity rules into running workflows, traceable evidence, and submission-ready artifacts.

## Proof Priorities

- show the product operating end to end;
- make AI decisions inspectable through generated artifacts;
- tie every claim to an evidence slot;
- keep external submission automation receipt-backed;
- remove private applicant data from public artifacts.

## Strongest Evidence

- manifest: `evidence/public/manifest.json` (active).
- gemini_call: `evidence/public/gemini_receipt_redacted.json` (active).
- google_cloud_deploy: `evidence/public/cloud_run_redacted.md` (planned).
- revenue_ledger: `evidence/evidence_ledger.md` (planned).
- user_ledger: `evidence/evidence_ledger.md` (planned).

## Competitive Frame

Position against manual operations and generic AI tooling by emphasizing domain-specific rules, evidence boundaries, and automation receipts.

## Closing Line

ContestOps AI turns deadline pressure into a repeatable AI operations workflow with checklists, evidence, payloads, and receipts.

## Proof Sprint

- Qualified outreach targets: 0/20 (ready).
- Discovery calls: 0/5 (ready).
- Paid pilots or signed invoices: 0/3 (must_win).
- Env-backed Gemini receipts: 0/3 (planned).
- Cloud Run receipts: 0/1 (planned).
- Submission dry-runs: 1/2 (active).
